sections.paragraph:
ἀναξίως (Soph., Hdt. et al.; Teles p. 56, 9; Sb 1267, 5; 2 Macc 14:42) adv. of ἀνάξιος in an unworthy/careless manner ἐσθίειν, πίνειν of the Eucharist 1 Cor 11:27 (29 v.l.). For partaking of the Eucharist in an improper manner, and the results thereof, s. ConNeot 15, ’55, p. 27f.

Soph Soph , V b.c.—List 5

Hdt. Hdt. = Herodotus, V b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Teles Teles , III b.c.—List 5

Sb Sb = Sammelbuch griechischer Urkunden aus Aegypten—Lists 3, 4

adv. adv. = adverb, adverbially

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

ConNeot ConNeot = Coniectanea Neotestamentica—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 69
